chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 3031 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Kashif Hussain Aga, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with ASI M. Ramzan Malik Police Station Hala on behalf of SSP Matiari and S.H.O. Police Station Hala. -------- Learned A.A.G. files parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3 which are taken on record and copy whereof has been supplied to the counsel for the petitioner who submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. says that no harassment whatsoever was ever caused to the Petitioner and further he will ensure that the official Respondents should not caused any harassment to the Petitioner. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in future. JUDGE JUDGE A.
